results.name: creates oracle copy
results.description: These cards create a copy of an Oracle card by name and cast it. (CR 707.13)

results.name: creates oracle token
results.description: These cards create a token version of an Oracle card by name (CR 111.11)

results.name: creates token of a card
results.description: These cards create a token with characteristics seen on a printed card. There may not be an associated physical token. See the parent tag above for more information.

results.name: creation date
results.description: The artist included that date of the piece's creation within the card art.

results.name: creature-ability-noncreature
results.description: Noncreature, non-Vehicle, non-Spacecraft permanents with abilities that become more relevant when they're animated as creatures, like combat keywords and attack triggers.

results.name: creature armor
results.description: Armor for non-human creatures, like horses or wurms.

results.name: creaturefall
results.description: Cards that care about a creatures entereing the battlefield. Also known as Alliance in New Capenna.

results.name: creatureland
results.description: Lands that can animate themselves.

results.name: creature type hero
results.description: The Hero type originally appeared on several older cards before being deprecated in the Grand Creature Type Update of 2007. It would later go on to be reintroduced to Magic via Marvel, but this tag is for the originals.

results.name: creature type name
results.description: Cards with names comprised of creature types.

results.name: creature type ship
results.description: These were ships, but now are the type that is crewing them (Not the keyword, you know what I mean)

results.name: crepuscular ray
results.description: Crepuscular rays are rays of sunlight that appear to radiate from the point in the sky where the sun is located. These rays are columns of sunlit air separated by darker cloud-shadowed regions.

results.name: crested helmet
results.description: A helmet with a crest that accentuates height. Especially well associated with the Romans and with Theros.

results.name: crook
results.description: A shepherd's crook; a hooked staff.

results.name: cross-legged
results.description: Or "criss-cross applesauce," as it's known in some dialects. Not to be confused with [Legs Crossed](legs-crossed), which is a different sitting pose entirely.

results.name: crow
results.description: Crows and ravens.

results.name: crown
results.description: Ornate headwear, often symbolizing power or royalty.  👑

results.name: crystal ball
results.description: Often depicted as instruments of divination or remote-viewing. 🔮

results.name: crystal tower (ffxiv)
results.description: Allagan structure that exists on multiple shards of the FF14 world.

results.name: crystarium
results.description: The settlement built around the displaced crystal tower in The First.

results.name: c'tan
results.description: The ancient demigod-like beings of the stars, that created the Necrons, and then became broken and enslaved by them.

results.name: cube
results.description: A geometric figure comprised of 6 square faces.

results.name: cuirass
results.description: Torso armor consisting of breastplate and backplate.

results.name: cuisses
results.description: Thigh armor strapped to the leg.
